name: Cesium
description: Cesium — JavaScript library for 3D geospatial visualization using WebGL with global terrain and satellite imagery.

seo.title: Cesium — Maps / Geolocation / Routing
seo.meta_description: Cesium: Cesium — JavaScript library for 3D geospatial visualization using WebGL with global terrain and satellite imagery.

when_to_use: 3D globe visualization with streaming terrain and satellite imagery
Rendering geospatial data in WebGL without a GIS server
Flight path and UAV trajectory visualization in 3D
Digital twin environments with real-world geographic context
Time-dynamic 3D maps for defense and simulation applications

pros: Used by defense, aerospace, and smart cities
cons: Steep learning curve for 3D geospatial concepts
WebGL performance demanding on low-end devices
Cesium ion hosted data can get expensive
review.verdict: The definitive 3D geospatial library; essential for aerospace and digital twins, heavy for consumer apps.
review.best_for: 3D visualization of terrain, satellite data, and digital twins
review.not_for: Simple 2D location markers on a consumer map

lock_in.reason: Open-source core, Cesium ion cloud freemium
